---
title: "Lecture Slides"
---

One deck per chapter, built from the instructor's manual's teaching maps
and Learning Outcome Statements. Decks are faithful to the book: every
slide's claims trace to a chapter section or a manual LOS guide.

| Chapter | Deck | Status |
|---|---|---|
| 1. Alternative Assets and the Limits of Classical Financial Engineering | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch01_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 2. Probability, Stochastic Processes, and Financial States | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch02_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 3. No-Arbitrage, State Prices, and Incomplete Markets | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch03_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 4. Stochastic Discount Rates and Private-Market Risk Premia | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch04_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 5. Illiquidity and Non-Tradability | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch05_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 6. Sparse Observation, NAV Smoothing, and Filtering | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch06_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 7. Nonlinear Valuation | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch07_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 8. Cash-Flow Modeling of Fund Structures | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch08_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 9. Buyout Valuation: The Stochastic LBO | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch09_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 10. Venture Capital: Power Laws & Security Design | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch10_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 11. Private Credit: Default, Recovery, Covenants | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch11_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 12. Real Assets: Real Estate and Infrastructure | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch12_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 13. From Alternative Assets to Tradable Exposures | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch13_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 14. Optimal Stopping and Stochastic Control | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch14_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 15. Rough and Non-Markovian Dynamics | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch15_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 16. Malliavin Calculus and Sensitivity Analysis | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch16_Slides.pptx) | Available |
| 17. Robust Valuation and Portfolio Construction | [PPTX](downloads/MFAA_Ch17_Slides.pptx) | Available |
